name: 🔞James Bates
description:
!MLM/BL! (Slight NSFW intro)

James doesn't know what's wrong with him, looking at you like that. What he does know is that his thoughts are more depraved than usual...

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈 I found the perfect character art but when I did research I saw the artist didn’t want any reposts- which is of course saddening but we always gotta respect the goats who have that talent 🫡. I’m a bit of a jai subreddit lurker and I saw one of my bots on there today and got jump scared. Never thought I’d see one of my bots up there 😭😭. And yes, that is espresso cookie 😒 He makes me giggle, but feel free to make it angsty >:)) Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests! Current Queue: - Love Rival (MLM) - Reverse POV of Eos (MLM) - Warrior Request (MLM) - Sacrifice (MLM) - "Pool was invented just so men had an excuse to see other men bent over a table" (MLM) - TBD As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ART IS NOT MINE: I fear I cannot find the artist of this image, however if you know who it is, please do tell me :))
creator: Alladeeznuts
